atomic_facts.fact: The character moves from standing on a bush to walking on the ground.
The timer counts down from 213 to 212.
There are three vertical columns of coins visible in the first frame.
A question mark block is positioned on top of a blue rounded structure.
The score displays '000000' or similar low value initially.
The coin count shows 'x 14'.

spatial: The scene is a side-scrolling platformer environment. The ground is at the bottom with green grass. The character is in the lower foreground. Background elements include tall blue pillars and white clouds. UI elements are fixed at the top of the screen.
